content.problemStatement: You are given a sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ and an integer XXX. The weirdness of a contiguous subsequence Al,Al+1,…,ArA_l, A_{l+1}, \ldots, A_rAl​,Al+1​,…,Ar​ is defined as W(l,r)=∑i=lrAi⋅Xi−lW(l, r) = \sum_{i=l}^r A_i \cdot X^{i-l}W(l,r)=∑i=lr​Ai​⋅Xi−l. Find P=∏i=1N∏j=iNW(i,j)2P = \prod_{i=1}^N \prod_{j=i}^N W(i, j)^2P=∏i=1N​∏j=iN​W(i,j)2 modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and XXX.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer PPP modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.
